findings.check: ATLAS heartbeat parse (health, GI, anomalies, EVE)
findings.detail: Parsed 20260401T074328Z.json: health=degraded, composite=0.675, anomalies=2, gi=0.83, mode=green. Endpoints: micro_agents=true, integrity=true, runtime=false. No EVE global_tension field in heartbeat payload.

Live composite 0.699 (slightly up vs 0.675). Two anomalies still listed: GAIA/USGS Earthquake elevated (78 quakes M2.5+, max M5.7) and DAEDALUS-µ/Self-ping elevated (HTTP 401, 63ms). Both remain elevated—persistent class. THEMIS is healthy=false with data.gov catalog/official and last-good-cache failed; not counted in anomalies array but is active degradation.

source=mock: GI is not production-truth. global_integrity=0.83 mode=green aligns directionally with live micro composite ~0.7 but cannot be verified as computed from live signals. signals.freshness=0.6 and signals.information=0.6 indicate degraded freshness axes; kv=false.

findings.check: Vercel deployment health (last 6h, READY, ignoreCommand/bot skips)
findings.detail: No VERCEL_TOKEN or linked project in workspace; npx vercel whoami not usable non-interactively. Production origin responds 200 for key routes—site is up—but deployment list, ERROR states, and ignoreCommand behavior could not be verified via Vercel API/CLI this run.

Heartbeat records runtime=false. Live GET /api/runtime/status returns 200 ok=true, source=github-commit, last_run 2026-04-01T09:13:36Z; freshness.status=degraded (~61m lag at check). ATLAS endpoint probe appears false or stale relative to production.

source=mock, global_tension=low, degraded=true (reason: live feed returned no fresh items). No high/elevated tension vs green GI disconnect. Persistent micro anomalies (seismic volume, self-ping 401, THEMIS upstream) correlate with infrastructure/data feeds, not live geopolitical tension.

eve_correlation: EVE is on mock fallback with global_tension low; placeholder items only. Elevated seismic and auth-gated self-ping are orthogonal to EVE; THEMIS data.gov failures are transparency-pipeline, not news-driven.
recommendation: Treat GI as indicative only until source is live and kv-backed. Investigate THEMIS data.gov path and DAEDALUS self-ping 401 (expected vs misconfig). Reconcile ATLAS runtime probe with live /api/runtime/status. Re-run ZEUS with Vercel token to validate deployments and ignoreCommand.
